title: Noah Lucas homepage v016 moonlit hero, optical glass, and Serve animation
changeSummary: Uses the original Sony moonlit Yosemite photo for the hero image instead of the generated faded evening derivative.
Removes full-page wash layers and keeps hero media unfiltered so the photograph renders directly.
Sets the theme fade base to white for day and black for night.
Uses one optical gray text token in both themes, with luminous day glass and dark night glass creating the perceived contrast shift.
Makes the day treatment transparent liquid glass rather than a flat white surface.
Restores the Serve Robotics animated robot as a transparent animated WebP without the white media layer.
Keeps the Capital IQ skyline media and centered cityscape crop from v015.
Keeps the release behind the external-assets pointer contract; live Squarespace editor is not modified.

validation.method: Headless Google Chrome DevTools Protocol against local v016 preview temp file
checks: hero image does not reference the generated yosemite-evening-clean derivative
hero image computed filter:none and opacity:1 in day and night themes
day fade is #ffffff and night fade is #000000
same rgb(118, 118, 118) optical gray is applied to primary text in both themes
body pseudo wash layers are disabled
Serve media uses serve-robotics-transparent-v016.webp and loads after scroll
Serve media container remains transparent with no white layer
desktop day/night and Serve screenshots rendered nonblank

supersedesReason: Fixes the faded dark-mode hero, removes the Serve white layer, and tunes the day/night optical glass system.

productionValidation.method: Headless Google Chrome DevTools Protocol against noahlucas.com and GitHub Pages latest pointer
checks: GitHub Pages latest pointer served v016
noahlucas.com rendered the v016 release in day and night themes
public hero image used a7r03511-fixed-bg-5120.jpeg with computed filter:none and opacity:1
public day fade was #ffffff and night fade was #000000
public primary text used the same rgb(118, 118, 118) optical gray in both themes
public page had no generated yosemite-evening-clean reference
public Serve media used serve-robotics-transparent-v016.webp and loaded after scroll
public Serve media container was transparent with no white layer
public body pseudo wash layers were disabled
